title: ERROR: Assert `buf_norm_wire_queue.empty()' failed in kernel/rtlil_bufnorm.cc:528.
body:
<!-- Failed to upload "synth_bp_single.rtl_asap7_base_2025-09-27_11-51.tar.gz" -->

### Version

Yosys 0.57+157 (git sha1 e546f3b, g++ 13.3.0-6ubuntu2~24.04 -fPIC -O3)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

[synth_bp_single.rtl_asap7_base_2025-09-27_11-51.tar.gz](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/22589271/synth_bp_single.rtl_asap7_base_2025-09-27_11-51.tar.gz)

1. Extract the file.
2. ./run


### Expected Behavior

No ERROR.

### Actual Behavior

16. Executing ABC_NEW pass.

16.1. Executing ABC9_OPS pass (helper functions for ABC9).

16.2. Executing BOX_DERIVE pass. (derive modules for boxes)

16.3. Executing ABC9_OPS pass (helper functions for ABC9).

16.4. Mapping module 'bsg_chip'.

16.4.1. Executing ABC9_OPS pass (helper functions for ABC9).

16.4.2. Executing ABC9_OPS pass (helper functions for ABC9).
ERROR: Assert `buf_norm_wire_queue.empty()' failed in kernel/rtlil_bufnorm.cc:528.
